case_title: ROY LI et al VS. KATHLEEN DUFFY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,105.00 FILED BY LI, ROY LIM, MEI NAH LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT DUFFY, KATHLEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE , "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL/MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS NO ANSWER AT THE DOOR, NO ACTIVITY WAS HEARD INSIDE". FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, ROY LIM, MEI NAH LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT DUFFY, KATHLEEN
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-19-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-15-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, ROY LIM, MEI NAH LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUFFY, KATHLEEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
